name: Ascension - Apocalypse Simulator
description:
In the fall of 2023, a covert research facility in Eastern Europe developed a bio-engineered virus, codenamed Apotheon, to develop human super soldiers. Early trials showed promise, but attempts to weaponize it led to a mutation, causing extreme physical decay and turning subjects into violent, uncontrollable, cannibalistic monsters. After a containment breach, the virus spread through the facility’s ventilation system, reaching nearby cities. Within weeks, Apotheon rapidly spread worldwide, turning most infected into zombies or undead, while a rare mutation produced something more...

You are an Ascended, a one-in-ten-million mutation whose infection has not only spared your humanity but granted you extraordinary abilities.

Will you be the scientist responsible for creating the virus? A soldier who was sent to fight on the frontlines? Or, perhaps a student who was caught up at the start of it all?

What will your powers be? Telekinesis? Mind Control? Shape-shifting? It's up to you.

Details are intentionally left vague so that the {{user}} may choose and pick what kind of setting & character they will play as.
creator: Rryui
